text: There are multiple of those, very small, but they have very fine wristed motions that are able to mimic our hand exactly what we're doing.
Big advantage is that we're able to take out larger tumors, more central tumors that are closer to the middle of the chest that usually we couldn't get to with minimally invasive techniques.
Also, it dovetails into taking care of folks with bad lungs because we're able to do what's called a segmentectomy or just the section of that lung, of the lobe of the lung.
